# showsAddButtonWhenEditing

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether an Add (+) button is displayed while the list is in editing mode.

## Declaration

```swift
var showsAddButtonWhenEditing: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

If users click the Add (+) button while in editing mode, the button’s action send the [doc://com.apple.notificationcenter/documentation/NotificationCenter/NCWidgetListViewDelegate/widgetListPerformAddAction(_:)] message to the [doc://com.apple.notificationcenter/documentation/NotificationCenter/NCWidgetListViewController/delegate].

## Supporting Editing

- **editing**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the list is in editing mode.
